src/main/java/com/example/demo/customer/.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Update the base request mapping path to include an 'api' prefix for better URL structure.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/errors/Gl.general_idea: Migrate the import statement from the legacy javax.validation package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.validation package required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 environments.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by newer Spring Boot versions.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.human_impl: import jakarta.servlet.*; import jakarta.servlet.annotation.WebFilter; import jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;

src/main/java/com/example/demo/logging/S.general_idea: Enhance logging output to include the HTTP method alongside the URI for better request traceability.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace local instantiation of ObjectMapper with an injected field to improve testability and resource management.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.human_impl: private final ObjectMapper objectMapper; // injected instead of new ObjectMapper()

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21 ecosystems.
Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with modern SecurityFilterChain bean definition to comply with Spring Security 5.7+/6.x requirements.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.human_impl: public class JwtSecurityConfigurer { @Bean public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) ... }

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Add @EnableMethodSecurity annotation to enable method-level security pre/post annotations, replacing the deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity.
Obtain AuthenticationManager from AuthenticationConfiguration instead of overriding authenticationManagerBean() in the adapter.
Replace deprecated antMatchers() with requestMatchers() in the HttpSecurity configuration.
Replace deprecated cors().and() with cors().configurationSource() and use addAllowedOriginPattern for dynamic origins.
Configure logout success handler using the builder API and HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler.
Extract JWT filter instantiation into separate methods to pass dependencies explicitly, removing reliance on adapter methods.
Update the list of permitted URL patterns to reflect new API paths and remove static asset patterns.
Introduce environment property support for dynamic CORS origin configuration.
Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements.
Update JWT parsing logic to use the new JJWT API (parser/verifyWith) which replaces the deprecated parserBuilder/setSigningKey pattern.
Update JWT building logic to use the new JJWT builder API (subject/expiration) which replaces the deprecated setSubject/setExpiration pattern.
Extract token extraction and username parsing into separate private methods to improve modularity and testability.
Remove unused import java.util.Objects after refactoring null checks to use standard operators.
Update the base request mapping path to include API versioning.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions on JDK 21.
